31781.title: Call the Midwife
31781.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

31782.title: Summer of Rockets
31782.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

31783.title: Father Brown
31783.description: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn for the worst when the local lord is found strangled.

31784.title: Call the Midwife
31784.description: The team tries to unite an estranged mother and daughter who are both pregnant. Also, Trixie's friend is devastated to discover she is pregnant.

31785.title: Summer of Rockets
31785.description: Hannah arrives at Buckingham Palace, but is too late to be presented. Samuel meets two men who are interested in his invention: Denning and Mr Field. He learns that they are from MI5 and he is sworn to secrecy, and the Petrukhins attend a fete at the Shaw's.

31786.title: Mary Berry Cooks
31786.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.

31787.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
31787.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

31788.title: Bargain Hunt
31788.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

31789.title: Bad Move
31789.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

31790.title: Keeping Up Appearances
31790.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

31791.title: Doctors
31791.description: It's Valerie's 50th birthday and a celebrity is in town. When their plans go awry, Emma and Luca find themselves sharing more than they expect.

31792.title: EastEnders
31792.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

31793.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
31793.description: Frank and Lu investigate a case of culinary sabotage when a restaurant owner accuses a food critic of giving him an undeserved bad review.

31794.title: Bargain Hunt
31794.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of mums and daughters battle it out to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, while Eric finds out about Derby's industrial heritage.

31795.title: Impossible
31795.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

31796.title: Antiques Roadshow
31796.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

31797.title: Bad Move
31797.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

31798.title: Keeping Up Appearances
31798.description: Hyacinth still wants to join Emmet's production of `The Boyfriend', but fortunately for him, other things have to take priority.

31799.title: Bargain Hunt
31799.description: Anita Manning presents from Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. There is magic in the air as a magician and his assistant take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.

31800.title: Doctors
31800.description: It's Valerie's 50th birthday and a celebrity is in town. When their plans go awry, Emma and Luca find themselves sharing more than they expect.

31801.title: EastEnders
31801.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

31802.title: Impossible
31802.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

31803.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
31803.description: Frank and Lu must recover a precious jewel and a rebellious teenager before midnight strikes at Lady Bede's End of Summer Ball.

31804.title: Antiques Roadshow
31804.description: The team is at Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon. Finds include a glorious tiara, a teddy bear with an intriguing secret, and a silver platter that is not all that it seems.

31805.title: Bad Move
31805.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

31806.title: Keeping Up Appearances
31806.description: When Hyacinth decides that a new car is in order, she aims rather higher than most people - much to Richard's horror.

31807.title: Doctors
31807.description: It's Valerie's 50th birthday and a celebrity is in town. When their plans go awry, Emma and Luca find themselves sharing more than they expect.

31808.title: EastEnders
31808.description: Sonia lets her guard down as Nancy and Frankie meddle in Shirley's love life. Tiffany's insecurities cause her to make a snap decision. Callum feels helpless, and Jean has some advice for Ruby, who feels like giving up.

31809.title: Impossible
31809.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

31810.title: Mary Berry Cooks
31810.description: Mary Berry is cooking dishes for a family celebration. She makes it seem almost effortless, with recipes for beef and mushroom stew with mustard mash, salmon en croûte with a foolproof salad, and chocolate and orange panna cotta.

31811.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life
31811.description: Paul Hollywood returns to his Merseyside roots and family, with ginger biscuits, coconut tray bake, millionaire's shortbread, and his dad's floury baps on the menu.

31812.title: Doctors
31812.description: Valerie tries to track down the baby from the photo in the mystery box. A new sergeant joins the station, but Rob isn't too happy about it. Jimmi tries to help a young lad with a stammer who has vital information for the police but is struggling to share it.

31813.title: EastEnders
31813.description: Sharon's comments leave Kat feeling uncertain. Tiffany tries to cover her mistake, Rocky pulls out all the stops for Sonia, and Ben makes a discovery.

31814.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
31814.description: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters.

31815.title: Silent Witness
31815.description: The Lyell team investigate the shooting of a family who were picnicking by a river.

31816.title: Father Brown
31816.description: When Lady Felicia's home comes under threat due to a diamond that she refused to sell to a Russian, Father Brown must seek help from an unlikely ally.
